1.project_desc: This project combined both design and development work. This project transformed a manual, high-friction onboarding process into a brand new user experience.

2.project_desc: This project combined both design and development work. We were working with two outdated, poorly structured forms. The goal was to reduce that friction, minimize support requests, and modernize the overall user experience.

3.project_desc: My newest work in progress! I have never loved the user exprience I get when going to pay off my student loans. This project is essentially a re-skin of my current loan provider for my student loans.

4.project_desc: What is so unique about this portfolio site? It is a pixel-perfect implementation of TailwindCSS's 'Spotlight' template, but completely converted by hand into Vue (from React)

5.project_desc: A simple Vue3 project that consumes the PokeDex API, giving you a sleek UI to see the wonderful world of Pokemon. (In progress)
